name: Emerald Twilight
description: A refined dark theme inspired by the calm beauty of emerald forests at dusk. Rich greens and cool teal accents create a balanced atmosphere, while soft neutral shades keep the interface elegant, modern, and easy on the eyes.
author: DrDisagree

name: ColorBlendr Classic
description: ColorBlendr Classic is a timeless color theme combining smooth gradients, balanced contrasts, and elegant tones for a clean modern experience. With calming blues, vibrant accents, and refined neutrals
author: DrDisagree
